title: Set of 5 Frosted Spruce Picks, Green PE Tips, 32 cm – Flexible Branches for Christmas Trees & Wreaths
features: Pack of 5 frosted spruce picks for festive decorating
8 green PE tips per pick with crisp frosted coating
32 cm total height including flexible 12 cm stem
Ideal for adding texture to trees, wreaths and garlands
Perfect for layering, volume and seasonal craft use
description: Add a snowy touch to festive arrangements with this pack of 5 frosted spruce picks. Each pick features 8 realistic green PE tips with a clearly frosted coating and a flexible 12 cm stem, ideal for layering into trees, wreaths, garlands or table décor. At 32 cm tall, they bring depth and natural texture to seasonal displays.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Decorating Christmas Trees, Wreaths, Garlands, and Table Arrangements
